jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Jodhpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital South Asia Partners:
Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital South Asia Partners!
